build-game.description: Build a complete Three.js game using the game director
build-game.prompt: Use threejs-game-director to build a premium game from scratch

upgrade-graphics.description: Upgrade game visuals to premium/AAA quality
upgrade-graphics.prompt: Use threejs-game-director to upgrade this game's visuals

debug-finish.description: Debug and finish a Three.js game
debug-finish.prompt: Use threejs-game-director to debug and finish this game
